message:
fix: add missing [vars] declarations to 9 formula TOML files (gt-54tbh)

Add computed variable declarations (default = "") to formula files that use
template variables in step descriptions without declaring them in [vars].
This fixes ValidateTemplateVariables failures across all embedded formulas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -207,3 +207,23 @@ or retire the dog if pool is oversized.
 [vars.convoy]
 description = "The convoy ID to archive"
 required = true
+
+[vars.contributor_list]
+description = "Computed: list of contributors to the convoy"
+default = ""
+
+[vars.duration]
+description = "Computed: how long the convoy ran"
+default = ""
+
+[vars.generated_summary]
+description = "Computed: auto-generated summary of convoy work"
+default = ""
+
+[vars.issue_count]
+description = "Computed: number of issues in the convoy"
+default = ""
+
+[vars.work_duration]
+description = "Computed: total work duration across all issues"
+default = ""

@@ -257,3 +257,43 @@ or retire the dog if pool is oversized.
 [vars.convoy]
 description = "The convoy ID to feed"

+default = ""

 required = true

+description = "Computed: number of dependent issues found"

@@ -196,3 +196,8 @@ The daemon will:
 Polecats are NOT auto-respawned. Use `gt sling` or let Witness
 restart them based on their preserved hooks.
 """
